positive: A majestic mountain owl silhouetted against a vibrant sunrise backdrop. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, featuring the owl perched on an elegant, curved branch. The owl should be stylized with dramatic, feather-scale patterns rendered in negative space and strong, clean outlines. The scene uses a limited, rich color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, ethereal gold, and midnight blue. Lighting should be dramatic backlighting (rim lighting) to enhance the silhouette effect. The print should have a clean, graphic, vector-like quality, suitable for screen printing on a dark garment. High contrast, minimalist detailing, suitable for a t-shirt print, flat lay presentation.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, messy, smoke, gradient noise, gradient color transitions, messy details, complex backgrounds
